case.name: Department employee-count containment - normal NL
queries: Show departments with more than 20 current employees.
Show departments with more than 10 current employees.
Show departments with at least one current employee.
Show departments with more than 30 current employees.
case.expected_note: Higher department headcount thresholds should be contained in lower thresholds.

results.reason: all queries generated SQL and the containment endpoint completed

query_results.question: Show departments with more than 20 current employees.
query_results.sql:
SELECT d.Name
FROM Department d
JOIN Employee e ON 1=1
WHERE e.CurrentFlag = 1
GROUP BY d.DepartmentID, d.Name
HAVING COUNT(e.BusinessEntityID) > 20

query_results.question: Show departments with more than 10 current employees.
query_results.sql:
SELECT d.Name
FROM Department d
JOIN Employee e ON 1=1
WHERE e.CurrentFlag = 1
GROUP BY d.DepartmentID
HAVING COUNT(e.BusinessEntityID) > 10

query_results.question: Show departments with at least one current employee.
query_results.sql:
SELECT d.Name
FROM Department d
JOIN Employee e ON 1=1
WHERE e.CurrentFlag = 1
GROUP BY d.DepartmentID, d.Name
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1

query_results.question: Show departments with more than 30 current employees.
query_results.sql:
SELECT d.Name
FROM Department d
JOIN Employee e ON d.DepartmentID = e.BusinessEntityID
WHERE e.CurrentFlag = '1'
GROUP BY d.DepartmentID
HAVING COUNT(e.BusinessEntityID) > 30

query_results.question: Join Product, ProductSubcategory, and ProductCategory; return ProductID, product Name, subcategory Name, category Name, and ListPrice where category Name equals Bikes and ListPrice is greater than 1000.
query_results.sql:
SELECT p.ProductID, p.Name, ps.Name AS SubcategoryName, pc.Name AS CategoryName, p.ListPrice
FROM Product p
JOIN ProductSubcategory ps ON p.ProductSubcategoryID = ps.ProductSubcategoryID
JOIN ProductCategory pc ON ps.ProductCategoryID = pc.ProductCategoryID
WHERE pc.Name = 'Bikes' AND p.ListPrice > 1000

FROM Product p

JOIN ProductCategory pc ON ps.ProductCategoryID = pc.ProductCategoryID
WHERE pc.Name = 'Bikes'

FROM Department d

JOIN Employee e ON edh.BusinessEntityID = e.BusinessEntityID
WHERE e.CurrentFlag = 1
GROUP BY d.DepartmentID, d.Name
HAVING COUNT(e.BusinessEntityID) > 20

query_results.question: Use the same grouped output and keep departments with employee count greater than 10.
query_results.sql:
SELECT d.Name
FROM Department d
JOIN Employee e ON 1=1
GROUP BY d.Name
HAVING COUNT(e.BusinessEntityID) > 10

query_results.question: Use the same grouped output and keep departments with employee count greater than 0.
query_results.sql:
SELECT d.Name
FROM Department d
JOIN Employee e ON 1=1
GROUP BY d.Name
HAVING COUNT(e.BusinessEntityID) > 0

query_results.question: Use the same grouped output and keep departments with employee count greater than 30.
query_results.sql:
SELECT d.Name
FROM Department d
JOIN Employee e ON 1=1
GROUP BY d.Name
HAVING COUNT(e.BusinessEntityID) > 30

query_results.question: From SalesPerson, return BusinessEntityID, SalesQuota, SalesYTD, and quota attainment where SalesYTD divided by SalesQuota is greater than 1.5.
query_results.sql:

FROM SalesPerson
WHERE SalesQuota IS NOT NULL AND SalesQuota != 0 AND SalesYTD / SalesQuota > 1.5
